zh: 家長可在牆上貼些孩子喜愛的動物卡片、
en: Parents can put cards of the child's favorite animals on the walls,
like little white rabbits, monkeys, giraffes,
and even flowers, grass, and trees.

zh: 與孩子幼兒園的作品欄、
en: You can also make a space for their preschool artwork.

zh: 床上可擺設孩子喜歡的玩具或玩偶、
en: On the bed, place toys or dolls the child loves.

zh: 讓孩子參與佈置和設計、
en: Let the child take part in decorating and designing,

zh: 無形中孩子就有一種期待的喜悅、
en: and a quiet sense of excitement will grow in them.

zh: 也別忘了提醒孩子再過幾天就有自己的房間了、
en: Also remind them that in just a few days, their own room will be ready,

zh: 房間內有好多的動物陪他睡覺、
en: with so many animals to sleep beside them,

zh: 那些動物都是你的好朋友。
en: "All of these animals are your good friends."
